findings.detail: Read docs/catalog/heartbeats/2026-05-19T11-11-32Z-atlas.json — gi=0.64 mode=yellow source=kv; 11 elevated anomaly labels; seed_result=200 OK; sustain_eligible=false; seed_attempted=true; kv_keys show ECHO lanes false, LEDGER_CIRCUIT_OPEN false.

GET https://mobius-civic-ai-terminal.vercel.app/api/signals/micro 200 — gi=0.664 instrumentCount=40; each ATLAS-flagged label still shows source=error or score=0.3 (elevated stress). Micro payload cycle field remains C-306 while integrity-status reports C-316 (metadata drift).
GET /api/integrity-status 200 — source kv (not mock); global_integrity 0.64 matches ATLAS catalog gi; cycle C-316 aligned; gi_verified false in payload; terminal_status stressed degraded true.
GET /api/epicon/candidates 200 — count 0; no candidates, verification skipped (no POST /api/zeus/verify or /api/epicon/publish).
POST /api/vault/attest HTTP 404 (Next not-found HTML); quorum_status not returned — route absent on deployed surface.
POST /api/agents/journal HTTP 502 — body ok=false error=github_403 mirrored_to_kv=false; substrate canon write blocked.

recommendation: External instrument failures matching ATLAS elevated set remain persistent at live micro poll. Treat KV GI 0.64 as aligned with ATLAS for this pass; micro composite 0.664 is slightly higher due to live weighting. Reconcile micro sweep cycle field (C-306) with integrity cycle (C-316). Deploy POST /api/vault/attest for C-298 quorum. Restore GitHub permissions for agent journal writes.
